title: Treasure Network - PokePack
description: A pack created for use on Treasure Network's Cobblemon community server. This pack adds a number of quality-of-life mods as well as some performance boosts. All the mods in this modpack are used to enhance the player's gameplay experience.
body:
*Note: The modpack is built upon the Fabric ecosystem and thus will not work with Forge-based servers. The Treasure Network Cobblemon server is a Fabric server.*

 

#### A pack created for use on Treasure Network's Cobblemon community server. This pack adds a number of quality-of-life mods as well as some performance boosts. This pack builds upon the base mod found [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon).

This modpack is mainly used as a performance benefit to the official pack with some settings specially catered to the Treasure Network server. All the mods in this modpack are used to enhance the player's gameplay experience. 

![treasurenetworkimg](https://i.imgur.com/kJNHoAa.png)

***

Installation/Technical:
- Recommended to run with a minimum of 2.5 GB of memory. Use 3 GB or more for best performance.
- Most options should be preset, head to https://discord.gg/cbHDfyDZxd if there's any issues.
 

***
 

🌟 Treasure Network Features: 🌟
- Authentic Pokemon Experience!
- Vote Rewards!
- Economy + PokeShop!
- PokeTrade, PokeGift, and WonderTrade!
- Starter and Donator Kits!
- Backpacks!
- Modified Recipes!
- Custom Implemented Pokemon!
 

 ![treasurenetworkgmoltres](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1093639249783423148/1097921492261544057/image.png)

***

Server IP: play.treasurenetwork.co

Come join our discord! https://discord.gg/cbHDfyDZxd
